org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects

org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps
Predefined Swaps
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap used by org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
    Class
    Description
    ObjectSwap
    Used to swap out non-serializable objects with serializable replacements during serialization, and vis-versa during parsing.
